methods.name: jy_lib.compressor.ZstdStreamCompressor.__init__
documentation:
with ZstdStreamCompressor(size=len(data1) + len(data2), interval=1024*1024) as sc:
    sc.update(data=data1)
    sc.update(data=data2)
    return sc.stream
